claim: Open SWE is an async, fully autonomous coding agent that can plan, execute, write code, run tests, and create pull requests in a sandboxed cloud environment
actionable: Use Open SWE by connecting your GitHub account and adding labels to issues to trigger automated coding tasks

claim: Sandboxed execution of agents eliminates need for guardrails and prevents malicious command execution
actionable: Deploy agents in sandboxed environments to allow unrestricted command execution without security risks

claim: Open SWE with prompt caching saves 94.3% on token costs for long context tasks
actionable: Enable prompt caching in API calls to reduce token consumption on repeated tasks
